deploy.preDeployCommand: cd backend && python -c "print('OPS-RAILWAY-ROOT-001 predeploy bisection: container init ok')"
deploy.startCommand: cd backend && export PYTHONPATH=src:.. && python -m alembic upgrade head && exec python -m uvicorn asa.asgi:create_application --factory --host 0.0.0.0 --port "${PORT}"
